retry_reason: Put operations always succeed under normal conditions; failure indicates a use-after-free bug, so retry is meaningless.
contract_summary: This macro is a put wrapper that releases a reference on a BPF object (kptr) by calling bpf_obj_drop_impl. It decrements the object's refcount and potentially frees the object if the refcount reaches zero. After calling bpf_obj_drop, the caller must not use the kptr again. This is the release side of the reference-count lifecycle.

judge.reason: The macro is a thin wrapper around bpf_obj_drop_impl, which is a put function for the kptr's refcount. No other logic exists; the sole purpose is reference-count release.
